title: oncoba tettensis var. macrophylla
intro: Oncoba tettensis var. macrophylla, also known as the giant Oncoba, is a plant species belonging to the family Salicaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Oncoba tettensis var. macrophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
